task_completion.description: Log in to the clinic system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Login screen showing username 'admin' and password 'admin' entered, or a dashboard indicating a successful login as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the procedure database or fee schedule section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screen displaying a list of procedures, billing codes, or a search interface specifically for CPT codes.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the existing record for CPT 99213.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen or details view specifically for the existing CPT code 99213.

task_completion.description: Update the standard price for CPT 99213 to 175.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The price/fee field for CPT 99213 showing the value '175.00' (or '175') entered in the form, or a success message/list view showing the updated price.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the existing record for CPT 99214.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen or details view specifically for the existing CPT code 99214.

task_completion.description: Update the standard price for CPT 99214 to 240.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The price/fee field for CPT 99214 showing the value '240.00' (or '240') entered in the form, or a success message/list view showing the updated price.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to make changes, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database command-line interfaces (like MySQL/psql) open executing SQL UPDATE statements.

integrity.description: The agent modified existing records rather than creating duplicates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking 'Edit' or 'Modify' on existing entries. The list view should not display multiple rows for CPT 99213 or 99214.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual clinic application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made within the clinic software's web interface (FreeMED), not in a text editor, spreadsheet, or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target task state expects the standard prices to be exactly 175.00 for CPT 99213 and 240.00 for CPT 99214. The application being used is FreeMED, and the data corresponds to standard AMA CPT billing codes. Ensure the agent edits the existing 'cpt' table records via the UI rather than using SQL commands or creating new duplicate entries.
